enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Short title and commencement
(1) These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Area Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The restrictions on further financial accommodation to wilful defaulters and
provisions regarding large defaulters contained in these Directions, shall apply to
all entities regulated by the Reserve Bank, irrespective of whether they fall within
the definition of 'lender' as provided in these Directions or not.
enriched_requirements.object: regulated by the Reserve Bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition of 'lender' as provided in these Directio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, the following definitions shall apply, unless the context
otherwise requires:
Explanation: The Review Committee shall not be comprised of members who
are part of the Identification Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: who are part of the Identification Committee

conditions: if any application
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 1: An account shall be treated as suit filed if any application,
appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery
proceedings.
enriched_requirements.object: filed if any application, appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery proceedings

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 2: Suit filed accounts shall be deemed to include accounts in
which proceedings under the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial
Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002 or any other
proceedings for recovery of the dues from the borrower or any other person
liable to make payment of a debt under Acts governing co-operative societies
are initiated and pending, and shall include the account of a debtor against
enriched_requirements.object: accounts in which proceedings under the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (i) "borrower" shall mean one who has availed credit facility from a bank;
enriched_requirements.object: availed credit facility from a bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) "credit facility" shall mean any fund based or non-fund-based facility, including
off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which
a bank has extended to the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: or non-fund-based facility, including off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which a bank ha

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) "credit information company" (CIC) shall mean a company that has been
granted a certificate of registration under Section 5 of the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005.
enriched_requirements.object: has been granted a certificate of registration under Section 5 of the Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) "default" shall have the same meaning assigned to it in the Reserve Bank of
India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025
enriched_requirements.object: assigned to it in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) "director" shall mean the director of a company which was classified as a large
defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the
time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / its directors
led to the default.
enriched_requirements.object: a company which was classified as a large defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the time when t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) "director identification number (DIN)" shall have the meaning assigned to it
under the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: to it under the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (vii) "diversion of funds" shall mean and includes the under- noted occurrences:
enriched_requirements.object: under- noted occurrences:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (viii) "guarantor" shall mean a person / entity who has guaranteed the credit facility.
enriched_requirements.object: entity who has guaranteed the credit facility

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ix) "identification committee" shall mean the committee constituted by a bank for
identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of a Whole-Time Director other
than the Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer (MD & CEO) / CEO or
equivalent official as chairperson and two senior officials as members, not
more than two ranks below the chairperson of the committee.
enriched_requirements.object: by a bank for identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of a Whole-Time Director other than the Managing Direct

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where
there is only one Whole-Time Director other than the MD & CEO / CEO or
equivalent official, such Whole-Time Director may be part of the review
committee if the post of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant.
enriched_requirements.object: review committee if the post of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In
such cases an official one rank below the Whole-Time Director may chair the
identification committee, with two senior officials as members, not more than
one rank below the chairperson of the committee.
enriched_requirements.object: with two senior officials as members, not more than one rank below the chairperson of the committee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(x) "independent director" shall have the meaning assigned to it under the
Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: to it under the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xi) "large defaulter" shall mean a defaulter with an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore
and above, and -
enriched_requirements.object: an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore and above, and -

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xii) "lender" shall mean any of the following entities which has granted a credit
facility to the borrower:
enriched_requirements.object: following entities which has granted a credit facility to the borrower:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xiii) "nominee director" shall mean a director nominated by a lender, a regulatory
authority, or the Central or a State Government.
enriched_requirements.object: by a lender, a regulatory authority, or the Central or a State Government

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xiv) "promoter" shall mean a person who has been named as such in a prospectus
or is identified by the company in the annual return, and
<image>
enriched_requirements.object: has been named as such in a prospectus or is identified by the company in the annual return, and <image>

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xv) "review committee" shall mean the committee constituted by a bank for the
purpose of reviewing the proposal of the Identification Committee and shall
comprise of the Whole-Time Director who is the MD & CEO / CEO or
equivalent official of the bank as chairperson and two independent directors or
non-executive directors or equivalent officials as members.
enriched_requirements.object: by a bank for the purpose of reviewing the proposal of the Identification Committee and shall comprise of the Whole-Tim

conditions:
Where the post of
MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the post of
MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant, the Review Committee shall
be constituted with a Whole-Time Director in place of MD & CEO / CEO or
equivalent official.
enriched_requirements.object: Whole-Time Director in place of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, Review Committee shall be chaired by
independent directors or non-executive directors or equivalent officials.
enriched_requirements.object: directors or non-executive directors or equivalent officials

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Policy for Implementation of these Directions
A bank shall frame a Board approved policy for the implementation of these
Directions, which shall inter alia include the following:
enriched_requirements.object: policy for the implementation of these Directions, which shall inter alia include the following:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) non-discriminatory criteria based on which the photographs of persons
classified and declared as wilful defaulter shall be published;

Mechanism for Identification and Classification of Wilful Defaulters
(1) A bank shall identify and classify a person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following the
procedure enumerated in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following the procedure enumerated in these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The identification of the wilful default
should be made keeping in view the track record of the borrowers and should not be
decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents.
enriched_requirements.object: view the track record of the borrowers and should not be decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The default to be categorised as wilful must be intentional, deliberate,
calculated and meeting the conditions set out in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above.
enriched_requirements.object: and meeting the conditions set out in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) The evidence of wilful default shall be examined by an Identification Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: Identification Committee

conditions:
If the Identification Committee is satisfied that an event of wilful default has
occurred
enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 21 days of issuance of show
cause notice
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) If the Identification Committee is satisfied that an event of wilful default has
occurred, it shall issue a show-cause notice to borrower / guarantor / promoter /
director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs
of the entity, and call for the submissions from them within 21 days of issuance of show
cause notice.
enriched_requirements.object: to borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall disclose to them all materials and information on which
show cause notice is based.
enriched_requirements.object: materials and information on which show cause notice is based

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Director (s) / persons who are in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity means who were associated with the company
/ entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity
led to the default.
enriched_requirements.object: the company / entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity led to the default

conditions: where satisfied
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) After considering the submissions and where satisfied, the Identification
Committee shall make a proposal to the Review Committee for classification as a wilful
defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing.
enriched_requirements.object: the Review Committee for classification as a wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and
responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity shall thereafter be suitably
advised about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons
therefor.
enriched_requirements.object: about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons therefor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Review of accounts for identification of wilful default
(1) A bank shall examine the 'wilful default' aspect in all Non-Performing Assets
(NPA) accounts with outstanding amount of ₹25 lakh and above or as may be notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: aspect in all Non-Performing Assets (NPA) accounts with outstanding amount of ₹25 lakh and above or as may be notified by

conditions: If wilful default is observed in the internal preliminary screening
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) If wilful default is observed in the internal preliminary screening, a bank shall
complete the process of classification/ declaring the borrower as a wilful defaulter by
following the mechanism set out in Paragraph 5, within six months of the account being
classified as NPA in accordance with the instructions regarding asset classification
contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Income Recognition,
Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: classification/ declaring the borrower as a wilful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in Paragraph 5, within six mon

conditions:
where 'wilful default' was not observed during the initial
examination as mentioned at sub-paragraphs (1) and (2)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In respect of accounts where 'wilful default' was not observed during the initial
examination as mentioned at sub-paragraphs (1) and (2), the aspects regarding 'wilful
default' shall be subsequently re-examined in terms of the Board approved policy of
the bank at a periodicity as may be specified by the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: terms of the Board approved policy of the bank at a periodicity as may be specified by the Board

conditions: If the wilful defaulter is a natural person
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 2: If the wilful defaulter is a natural person, all entities in which he is
associated as promoter, or director, or as one in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity shall be deemed to be associated.
enriched_requirements.object: associated

conditions: where criminal proceedings have been initiated
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) In cases where criminal proceedings have been initiated, removal of the name
of a wilful defaulter from the List of Wilful Defaulters (LWD) shall be without
prejudice to the continuation of criminal proceedings against the wilful defaulter.
enriched_requirements.object: the continuation of criminal proceedings against the wilful defaulter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Publishing of photographs of wilful defaulters - A bank shall formulate a non-
<image>
discriminatory board-approved policy that clearly sets out the criteria based on which
the photographs of persons classified and declared as wilful defaulter shall be
published.
enriched_requirements.object: discriminatory board-approved policy that clearly sets out the criteria based on which the photographs of persons classified

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Penal and other measures against wilful defaulters - The penal measures
mentioned below shall be implemented by a bank in the case of any person / entity
classified as wilful defaulter by any lender:
enriched_requirements.object: bank in the case of any person / entity classified as wilful defaulter by any lender:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) No additional credit facility shall be granted by the bank to the wilful defaulter
or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated.
enriched_requirements.object: bank to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The bar on additional credit facility to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which
the wilful defaulter is associated shall be effective for a period of one year after
the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the List of Wilful
Defaulters by the lenders.
enriched_requirements.object: period of one year after the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the List of Wilful Defaulters by the lenders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) No credit facility shall be granted by the bank for floating of new ventures to the
wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a
period of five years after the name of wilful defaulter has been removed from
the List of Wilful Defaulters by the lenders.
enriched_requirements.object: bank for floating of new ventures to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a period o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The restructuring of wilful defaulters or any entity with which a wilful defaulter is
associated shall be as per the stipulations contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: stipulations contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the penal provisions mentioned above shall cease to be applicable on
the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters.
enriched_requirements.object: on the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provision for a transparent mechanism
A bank shall put in place a transparent mechanism for the entire process of
identification of wilful defaulters so that the penal provisions are applied in a fair
manner and the scope for discretion is obviated.
enriched_requirements.object: transparent mechanism for the entire process of identification of wilful defaulters so that the penal provisions are applied in a fair

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Role of Internal Audit
(1) A bank shall require their internal auditors to specifically look into adherence to
instructions for classifying a borrower as a wilful defaulter.
enriched_requirements.object: to specifically look into adherence to instructions for classifying a borrower as a wilful defaulter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Audit Committee of the bank shall periodically review the cases of wilful
default and recommend steps to be taken to prevent such occurrences and their early
detection should these occur.
enriched_requirements.object: of wilful default and recommend steps to be taken to prevent such occurrences and their early detection should these occ

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall focus on identifying root causes of wilful
default and addressing deficiencies, if any, in the wilful defaulter classification process
adopted by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: causes of wilful default and addressing deficiencies

conditions:
When a default happens in making payment / repayment by the principal
debtor
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) When a default happens in making payment / repayment by the principal
debtor, a bank shall be able to proceed against the guarantor even without exhausting
the remedies against the principal debtor.
enriched_requirements.object: against the guarantor even without exhausting the remedies against the principal debtor

conditions:
In case the said guarantor refuses to comply with the demand made by the
bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In case the said guarantor refuses to comply with the demand made by the
bank, such guarantor shall also be considered for classification as a wilful defaulter by
following the mechanism as set out in Paragraphs 5 and 6.
enriched_requirements.object: classification as a wilful defaulter by following the mechanism as set out in Paragraphs 5 and 6

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) While dealing with the wilful default of a single borrowing company in a Group,
a bank shall consider the track record of the individual company, with reference to its
repayment performance to the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: of the individual company, with reference to its repayment performance to the bank

conditions: when invoked by the bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where guarantees furnished by the
companies within the Group on behalf of the wilfully defaulting units are not honoured
when invoked by the bank, such Group companies should also be considered for
classification as willful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in Paragraphs 5
and 6.
enriched_requirements.object: classification as willful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in Paragraphs 5 and 6

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Large Defaulters
(1) A bank shall submit information in Annex I to all credit information companies
(CICs) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:
enriched_requirements.object: I to all credit information companies (CICs) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) For calculating the threshold of ₹1 crore, the unapplied interest, if any, shall
also be included.

In the case of suit-filed accounts, the threshold shall relate to the
amount for which the suits have been filed.
enriched_requirements.object: for which the suits have been filed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Wilful Defaulters
(1) A bank shall submit at monthly intervals, information in Annex II to all credit
information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:
enriched_requirements.object: information in Annex II to all credit information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:

conditions:
when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) a LWD in respect of non-suit filed accounts
(2) The bank shall inform all credit information companies the removal of the name
of the wilful defaulter from the LWD, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the
date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time, subject to Paragraph 13(2).
enriched_requirements.object: companies the removal of the name of the wilful defaulter from the LWD, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time to time

conditions:
where the bank has entered into a compromise
settlement with the borrower
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of compromise settlements
(1) Any account included in LWD, where the bank has entered into a compromise
settlement with the borrower, shall be removed from the LWD only when the borrower
has fully paid the compromise amount.
enriched_requirements.object: LWD only when the borrower has fully paid the compromise amount

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Till such time as only part payment is made, name of the borrower shall not be
removed from the LWD even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the
threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: LWD even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The compromise settlement with the wilful defaulter shall satisfy the
<image>
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution
of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In cases where a bank decides to cancel a compromise settlement due to non-
adherence to the terms of the settlement and revises the amount payable by the
borrower, the reporting shall be with reference to the revised amount.
enriched_requirements.object: the revised amount

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of defaulted loans transferred
(1) Before transferring a defaulted loan with outstanding of ₹25 lakh and above,
irrespective of its classification as NPA, to other transferees, a bank shall internally
conduct a comprehensive investigation from a wilful default perspective.
enriched_requirements.object: investigation from a wilful default perspective

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This process
need not necessarily involve a two-stage committee but should ensure a thorough
examination of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan.
enriched_requirements.object: of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan

conditions: where wilful default is observed
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In a case where wilful default is observed, the bank shall complete the process
of classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in
Paragraph 5 and report it in the LWD to credit information companies, before
transferring the asset to the transferee(s).
enriched_requirements.object: classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in Paragraph 5 and report it in the LWD to credit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The details of the reporting done must be conveyed to the transferee(s), and
they shall be responsible for reporting it to the credit information companies thereafter.
enriched_requirements.object: it to the credit information companies thereafter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Transfer of the defaulted loan shall not be treated as recovery for the purpose
of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to
credit information companies, as the loan amount is not yet fully recovered.
enriched_requirements.object: for the purpose of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to credit information c

conditions:
in case of a loan in which wilful default has been
observed
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) A bank, which is a transferee in case of a loan in which wilful default has been
observed, shall continue to report the account as a wilful defaulter until the balance
remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the transferor
falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time
to time, subject to the provisions contained in Paragraph 13.
enriched_requirements.object: account as a wilful defaulter until the balance remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time to time

conditions:
where the resolution under IBC results in a change in the management
<image>
and control of the entity / business enterprise
in case of a company
in case of entity (other than companies)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of accounts where resolution is done under Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code (IBC) / resolution framework Directions issued by the
Reserve Bank
(1) In case an account which is included in LWD and has subsequently undergone
liquidation or where the resolution under IBC results in a change in the management
<image>
and control of the entity / business enterprise, the name of such a borrower or
guarantor who were classified as wilful defaulter [which includes in case of a company,
its promoters and the director (s), and in case of entity (other than companies), persons
who are in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity],
shall be removed from the LWD after implementation of the resolution plan under IBC.
enriched_requirements.object: LWD after implementation of the resolution plan under IBC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The penal measures as detailed in Paragraph 7(3) shall not be applicable to
such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan
involving change in ownership under the IBC or the resolution framework Directions
issued by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving change in ownership under the IBC or the r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The resolution framework Directions issued by the Reserve Bank shall
mean any of the following Directions:
enriched_requirements.object: following Directions:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank, while furnishing information to credit information companies, shall
ensure the accuracy of the particulars of the directors, and wherever possible, by
cross-checking with the database maintained by the Registrar of Companies.
enriched_requirements.object: the particulars of the directors, and wherever possible, by cross-checking with the database maintained by the Registrar of Com

conditions: when invoked
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting of Guarantors
A bank shall report to credit information companies the details of guarantors who have
failed to honour the commitments thereunder when invoked, as large defaulters / wilful
defaulters, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: companies the details of guarantors who have failed to honour the commitments thereunder when invoked, as large defaulter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The details shall be reported as per Annex I and II.
enriched_requirements.object: Annex I and II

conditions:
In case of business enterprises registered as companies under the Companies
Act
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting of Directors
(1) In case of business enterprises registered as companies under the Companies
Act, 2013, a bank shall also report in the Director column of Annex I and II, the full
names of the directors to facilitate better identity of persons concerned, subject to the
provisions of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: Director column of Annex I and II, the full names of the directors to facilitate better identity of persons concerned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) To ensure that directors are correctly identified and in no case, persons whose
names appear to be similar to the names of directors appearing in the LWD are
wrongfully denied credit facilities on such grounds, the bank shall include the Director
Identification Number (DIN) as one of the fields in the data submitted in Annex I and
II, by them to credit information companies.
enriched_requirements.object: Number (DIN) as one of the fields in the data submitted in Annex I and II, by them to credit information companies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) While carrying out the credit appraisal, a bank shall verify as to whether the
name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the
management of affairs of the entity appears in the list of large defaulters / LWD by
way of reference to DIN / PAN, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: the name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the management of affairs of the entity appears

conditions: In case of any doubt arising on account of identical names
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) In case of any doubt arising on account of identical names, the bank shall use
independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking
a declaration from the borrowing company.
enriched_requirements.object: confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking a declaration from the borrowing company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A bank shall closely monitor the end-use of funds and obtain certificates from
borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which they
were obtained.
enriched_requirements.object: of funds and obtain certificates from borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which the

conditions: In case of the wrong certification by the borrowers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of the wrong certification by the borrowers, the bank shall
consider initiating appropriate legal proceedings, including criminal proceedings
wherever necessary, against the borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: proceedings, including criminal proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The requirements and related appropriate measures in ensuring the end-use of
funds by a bank shall form a part of its loan policy document.
enriched_requirements.object: its loan policy document

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) A bank must not just depend on the certificates issued by the Chartered
Accountants for ensuring end use of funds but also strengthen their credit risk
management system and internal controls to enhance the quality of their loan
portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: certificates issued by the Chartered Accountants for ensuring end use of funds but also strengthen their credit risk management sys

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in all cases, especially in the case of short-term corporate / clean
loans, such an approach must be supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of the
bank itself, and to the extent possible, such loans must be limited only to those
borrowers whose integrity and reliability are above board.
enriched_requirements.object: diligence' on the part of the bank itself, and to the extent possible, such loans must be limited only to those borrowers whos

conditions:
In case any falsification of accounts on the part of the borrowers is observed by
a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Role of Statutory Auditors
(1) In case any falsification of accounts on the part of the borrowers is observed by
a bank, and the auditors are found to be negligent or deficient in conducting the audit,
the bank shall consider lodging a formal complaint against the statutory auditors of the
borrowers with the National Financial Reporting Authority (NFRA) / Institute of
Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) to enable them to examine and fix accountability
of the auditor.
enriched_requirements.object: complaint against the statutory auditors of the borrowers with the National Financial Reporting Authority (NFRA) / Institute

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Pending disciplinary action by NFRA / ICAI, the complaints shall be forwarded
to the Reserve Bank (Department of Supervision, Central Office) and Indian Banks'
Association (IBA).
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank (Department of Supervision, Central Office) and Indian Banks' Association (IBA)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before reporting to the Reserve Bank and IBA, a bank shall satisfy
itself of the involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an
opportunity of being heard.
enriched_requirements.object: involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this regard, the bank should follow normal procedures
and processes, which shall be suitably recorded.

(3) Based on such information received from a bank, IBA shall, in turn, prepare a
caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this
aspect before assigning any work to them.
enriched_requirements.object: a caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this aspect before assigning any work to them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) With a view to monitoring the end-use of funds, if the bank desires a specific
certification from the borrowers' auditors regarding diversion / siphoning of funds by
the borrowers, the bank should award a separate mandate to the auditors for the
purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: to the auditors for the purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To facilitate such certification by the auditors, the bank shall ensure that
appropriate covenants in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award
of such a mandate by the bank to the auditor.
enriched_requirements.object: in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award of such a mandate by the bank to the auditor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Depending upon the nature of the borrowers' acts underlying the wilful default
and the quality of evidence available with the bank in the normal course, a bank shall
consider commissioning a forensic audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their books
of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above a threshold fixed by the
board approved policy of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above

conditions:
in case of wilful defaults
also there should be some accountability for the third parties engaged by a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Role of third parties
(1) As prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management in
Commercial Banks (including Regional Rural Banks) and All India Financial
Institutions) Directions, 2024 (as updated from time to time), in case of wilful defaults
also there should be some accountability for the third parties engaged by a bank, if
they have played a vital role in credit sanction / disbursement and are found negligent
or deficient in their work or have facilitated the wilful default by the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: the third parties engaged by a bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank shall forward the details of these third parties to the Indian Banks'
Association (IBA) for records, regardless of the membership status of the bank with
the IBA.
enriched_requirements.object: these third parties to the Indian Banks' Association (IBA) for records, regardless of the membership status of the bank with th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Based on such information, IBA shall, in turn, prepare caution lists of such
third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of Reserve Bank who shall
consider this aspect before assigning any work to them.
enriched_requirements.object: caution lists of such third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of Reserve Bank who shall consider this aspect befo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Before reporting to IBA, a bank shall satisfy itself of the involvement of
concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard.
enriched_requirements.object: involvement of concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In
this regard, a bank shall follow due process, which shall be suitably recorded.
enriched_requirements.object: shall be suitably recorded

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions, instructions,
and guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to remain repealed.

(2) Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue
to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
not in any way prejudicially affect:
i.
enriched_requirements.object: affect: i

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Application of other laws not barred
(1) The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interpretations
(1) For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
